channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Wait, what?! These noise-cancelling Sony headphones are only $98 during Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.description: The Sony WH-CH720N headphones, now for nearly half off at just $98.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Sony WH-CH720N on a couch cushion
media:content.media:text: Sony WH-CH720N on a couch cushion
media:content.media:title: Sony WH-CH720N on a couch cushion

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy A57 and A37 finally match flagships where it matters most
item.description: Samsung just dropped the sub-$600 Galaxy A57 and A37, packing flagship AI, killer specs, and six years of updates.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver
media:content.media:text: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver
media:content.media:title: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver

item.title: That's not a typo: Amazon's Big Spring Sale just knocked this smartwatch to only $49 for a limited time
item.description: The CMF by Nothing Watch Pro 3 offers a lot to be excited about—especially at this price.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Wearing the silver CMF Watch Pro 2 with the orange band
media:content.media:text: Wearing the silver CMF Watch Pro 2 with the orange band
media:content.media:title: Wearing the silver CMF Watch Pro 2 with the orange band

item.title: It's in the SongDNA: an 'immersive' Spotify test that lets you discover everyone involved
item.description: Spotify's Premium test, SongDNA, lets you crawl across a vast web of everyone involved in making your favorite track.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Spotify's SongDNA rolls out in a beta test for Premium users globally.
media:content.media:text: Spotify's SongDNA rolls out in a beta test for Premium users globally.
media:content.media:title: Spotify's SongDNA rolls out in a beta test for Premium users globally.

item.title: The Galaxy S26 update that brings iPhone AirDrop support starts rolling out widely
item.description: The latest Galaxy S26 update adds support for sending files to Apple devices.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Notification summary and prioritize notification feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Notification summary and prioritize notification feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Notification summary and prioritize notification feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: I see you, Gemini: Google TV rolls out handy features for 'Deep Dives' and sports-lovers
item.description: A handful of Gemini for Google TV features just dropped for users, and it's got something sports-lovers will enjoy.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google TV "Your apps" redesign
media:content.media:text: Google TV "Your apps" redesign
media:content.media:title: Google TV "Your apps" redesign

item.title: The Galaxy S26 Ultra successor should copy these 3 Ultra phones
item.description: With the Galaxy S26 Ultra out now, it's already time to look at what could be next for Samsung's Ultra phone. Here are three phones that Samsung should copy.
item.author: nirave@hot.tech (Nirave Gondhia)
item.dc:creator: Nirave Gondhia

media:content.media:description: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: Rokid's AI Glasses Style are an affordable Meta Ray-Ban rival, and they just got a discount
item.description: Rokid's AI glasses are a decent alternative to the Meta Ray-Ban, and they just got a discount, bringing the glasses down to $279.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Rokid AI Glasses Style on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Rokid AI Glasses Style on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Rokid AI Glasses Style on Android Central

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 look great on paper, but there's one thing holding them back
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 have a questionable fit. Is it a consequence of the style, or a problem with the Buds 4 specifically?
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 in black and silver.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 in black and silver.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 in black and silver.

item.title: Apple Maps may soon copy one of Google Maps' more annoying features
item.description: Apple is planning to roll out sponsored listings in Maps across the U.S. and Canada.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Apple iPhone 17 review on Android Central

item.title: This popular Oura and Galaxy Ring rival is returning to the US after a brief pause
item.description: Ultrahuman's Ring Pro is now available for pre-order in the U.S.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The Ultrahuman Ring Air held in fingertips to show the Ultrahuman logo engraved inside.

item.title: Yes, Visible Wireless will really give you 50% OFF the Google Pixel 10 when you use this code at checkout
item.description: Spring sale season has arrived, and Visible's Google Pixel 10 deal isn't messing around.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10 next to two faux potted plants

item.title: OPPO Find N6 vs. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7: We have a clear winner
item.description: The OPPO Find N6 is one of the best foldables in 2026, giving stiff competition to even Samsung's brilliant Galaxy Z Fold 7.

item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 looks the same, but leaks say the good stuff might be internal

item.title: Xreal's nebulaOS 2.0 update for the Beam Pro is crucial—this is what the huge patch brings
item.description: Xreal dropped a major nebulaOS 2.0 patch for the Beam Pro, marking its most significant patch for the device.

item.title: The OnePlus Nord Buds 4 Pro made me ditch my AirPods Pro 3, and it came down to this one feature

item.title: Privacy Display is my favorite Galaxy S26 Ultra feature, and this is how I master it
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra offers a Privacy Display feature that's easy to manually enable or disable, but you can configure it to automatically activate.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

item.title: Can you really get a FREE Galaxy S26 Ultra without trade at T-Mobile? Here's what you need to know about the viral deal
item.description: Add a line with the Experience Beyond plan and T-Mobile will give you a free Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra. It's as simple as that.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra teardown reveals a battery that's easy to replace... and not much else

item.title: Tecno taps OpenClaw to supercharge its Ella AI assistant with new automation features
item.description: Tecno is integrating OpenClaw into its Ella AI assistant, bringing new automation capabilities such as message prioritization and summarization, multi-app integration, and more.

item.title: The Sony WH-1000XM6 have crashed back to a record low price, just days before Amazon's Big Spring Sale

item.title: Three reasons why I like the Xiaomi Tag better than the AirTag and Galaxy SmartTag2
item.description: Xiaomi Tag is a Bluetooth tracker that looks sleek, pairs with both Find My and Find Hub networks, and is a much better value than Apple and Samsung's trackers.
